notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto walks. Dansby Swanson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki grounds into a force out, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. Alex Bregman out at 2nd. Seiya Suzuki advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr.

notableEvents.label: Ty France plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ty France hit by pitch. Miguel Andujar to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Ty France to 3rd. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Xander Bogaerts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts grounds into a double play, shortstop Dansby Swanson to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Ty France to 3rd. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Xander Bogaerts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets grounds out, second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets homers (14) on a fly ball to right center field. Ty France scores. Xander Bogaerts scores.

notableEvents.label: Jake Cronenworth pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Cronenworth flies out to left fielder Ian Happ.
